rationale: Educ. Code §12.003 addresses a school district board's authority to grant campus or program charters. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraisal values, or Tax Code §11.13. The proposed increase to the homestead exemption amount is wholly unrelated to this provision.
quote: This chapter does not limit the authority of the board of trustees of a school district to grant a charter to a campus or program to operate in accordance with the other provisions of this title and rules adopted under those provisions.
_note: No conflict detected. The rule text concerns school district charter authority and has no nexus to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
